description: Implement AnswerFileConsumer over the stub (verbatim identity + dual-hash binding, monotonic-seq/CAS once-only cross-runId consume, answerable-gate gating incl. clamped-hard-call/review-gate/terminal rejection, delimited-UNTRUSTED injection via a new PromptComposer.ComposeAction optional section, answer-injected decision + provenance) so the authored security matrix passes
